languages.original_text: "I fear my rendering will lack the sophistication inherent in Nuncius's Lingua-Technis, but, to crudely summarise, he is honoured by your attention and records the moment as significant."

languages.text: "Я боюсь, что моя трактовка будет лишена изящества, которым была пронизана его {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}лингва-технис{/g}. Но, если грубо суммировать, Нунциус польщен вашим вниманием и фиксирует данный момент как значимый".

traits.locale_text: "Я боюсь, что моя трактовка будет лишена изящества, которым была пронизана его {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}лингва-технис{/g}. Но, если грубо суммировать, Нунциус польщен твоим вниманием и фиксирует данный момент как значимый".

languages.text: 「私の解釈は、ヌンシウスの言語技術に内在する洗練さを欠くかもしれませんが、要約すると、彼はあなたの注目に感謝し、この瞬間を重要なものとして記録しています」
languages.original_text: "I fear my rendering will lack the sophistication inherent in Nuncius's Lingua-Technis, but, to crudely summarise, he is honoured by your attention and records the moment as significant."

languages.text: "Ich fürchte, meiner Übersetzung mangelt es an der natürlichen Raffinesse von Nuncius' {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g}, aber um seine Worte grob zusammenzufassen ... er empfindet Eure Aufmerksamkeit als Ehre und vermerkt den Moment als bedeutungsvoll."
languages.original_text: "I fear my rendering will lack the sophistication inherent in Nuncius's {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}, but, to crudely summarise, he is honoured by your attention and records the moment as significant."

traits.locale_text: "Ich fürchte, meiner Übersetzung mangelt es an der natürlichen Raffinesse von Nuncius' {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g}, aber um seine Worte grob zusammenzufassen ... er empfindet Eure Aufmerksamkeit als Ehre und vermerkt den Moment als bedeutungsvoll."

languages.text: «Me temo que mi interpretación carece de la sofisticación inherente a la {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Tecnis{/g} de Nuncius, pero en resumidas y burdas cuentas, se declara honrado por su interés y ha registrado el evento como significativo».
languages.original_text: "I fear my rendering will lack the sophistication inherent in Nuncius's {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}, but, to crudely summarise, he is honoured by your attention and records the moment as significant."

traits.locale_text: «Me temo que mi interpretación carece de la sofisticación inherente a la {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Tecnis{/g} de Nuncius, pero en resumidas y burdas cuentas, se declara honrado por su interés y ha registrado el evento como significativo».

languages.text: "Korkarım çevirim, Nuncius'un {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g} incelikten yoksun olacak ama kabaca özetlemek gerekirse ilginizden şeref duyduğunu ve bu anı önemli olarak kaydettiğini belirtiyor."
languages.original_text: "I fear my rendering will lack the sophistication inherent in Nuncius's {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}, but, to crudely summarise, he is honoured by your attention and records the moment as significant."

traits.locale_text: "Korkarım çevirim, Nuncius'un {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g} incelikten yoksun olacak ama kabaca özetlemek gerekirse ilginizden şeref duyduğunu ve bu anı önemli olarak kaydettiğini belirtiyor."

languages.text: « Je crains que toute tentative de traduction de ma part ne rende pas justice à la sophistication inhérente au {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g} de Nuncius, mais, pour résumer grossièrement, il est honoré de l'attention que vous lui témoignez et considère ce moment comme extrêmement significatif. »
languages.original_text: "I fear my rendering will lack the sophistication inherent in Nuncius's {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}, but, to crudely summarise, he is honoured by your attention and records the moment as significant."

traits.locale_text: « Je crains que toute tentative de traduction de ma part ne rende pas justice à la sophistication inhérente au {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g} de Nuncius, mais, pour résumer grossièrement, il est honoré de l'attention que vous lui témoignez et considère ce moment comme extrêmement significatif. »

languages.text: “恐怕我的转译将难以复现努恩修斯{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}科技文{/g}中原有的精妙，但若容我粗略概括——他很荣幸得到您的关注，并将此刻记录为重要时刻。”
languages.original_text: "I fear my rendering will lack the sophistication inherent in Nuncius's {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}, but, to crudely summarise, he is honoured by your attention and records the moment as significant."
